title: Customizable Farlands
description: Re-adds the Farlands world generation, with configuration for placement!
body:
This mod undoes the patch that removes the Farlands, while also allowing you to set where they spawn in the world through a config file.

This mod does nothing else other than that

## Configuration

To configure the mod, run your server with it installed, then go to config/farlands-common.toml and change the 'xDistance' and 'zDistance' values to where you want them to spawn. Default value is 12550625
